research_question: Within the observed same-snapshot ordinary-A cohort, do stocks whose complete-month daily returns are less positively ordered through time outperform an identical-universe equal-weight benchmark over the next independent monthly interval?
null_hypothesis: For each gated split, the population mean monthly net return difference between the frozen low-CRO basket and identical eligible-universe benchmark is less than or equal to zero.
economic_mechanism: Chronological return ordering measures whether formation-month gains are concentrated late rather than distributed or reversed; the single frozen direction tests low ordering as a simple path-shape mispricing hypothesis without adding momentum, reversal, regime or accounting filters.

forbidden_repairs: reverse the CRO direction or change the quantile
change the formation month, holding interval, liquidity floor, costs, splits, inference or gates
add momentum, reversal, regime, industry, size, volatility, quality or valuation filters
infer, cross-join or backfill an unobserved ordinary security

input_identity.snapshot_receipt_resolution: relative to the parent directory of the frozen database

cohort_coverage_disclosure.runtime_rule: recompute the observed snapshot set and exact master set difference; never cross join the full master into the signal universe
cohort_coverage_disclosure.interpretation: retrospective evidence for the observed cohort only, not full-universe or PIT evidence

required_fields.formation_rule: all accepted sessions in calendar month M plus the immediately prior accepted qfq_close; M must contain at least 14 accepted sessions
required_fields.complete_identity_rule: every required row is unique, finite where numeric, positive where required, non-synthetic, hash-valid and has the frozen quality classification
required_fields.missing_or_nonfinite_formation: exclude the security before ranking and publish aggregate exclusion counts only
required_fields.missing_or_invalid_entry_exit_panel: the interval is invalid; no replacement or silent benchmark shrinkage
required_fields.cross_split_interval: count once as a purged interval candidate and exclude before valid-split interval gates; a purge is not an invalid interval

universe_and_feature.decision_date: D, final accepted session of calendar month M
universe_and_feature.daily_return: qfq_close_t / qfq_close_t_minus_1 - 1 for every accepted session in M
universe_and_feature.cro: Pearson correlation between the complete daily-return vector and ordinal 1 through N
universe_and_feature.variance_rule: zero or nonfinite return variance, a nonfinite CRO, or fewer than 14 formation sessions excludes the security before ranking
universe_and_feature.liquidity: median formation-month amount must be at least CNY 50,000,000
universe_and_feature.selection: first floor(0.10 * eligible_count), at least 100; no tie expansion or replacement
universe_and_feature.benchmark: equal weight across the identical complete eligible universe

synthetic_interval.entry: qfq_open on first accepted session after D
synthetic_interval.exit: qfq_open on first accepted session after the following calendar month-end
synthetic_interval.split_rule: entry and exit must remain in one split
synthetic_interval.panel_scope: entry and exit panels must be complete for every benchmark-eligible security, including every selected security
synthetic_interval.strategy_gross: arithmetic mean selected simple qfq open-to-open returns
synthetic_interval.benchmark_gross: arithmetic mean identical eligible-universe simple qfq open-to-open returns
synthetic_interval.forbidden_claims: no cash, shares, lots, capacity, fills, blocked orders, tradability, corporate-action execution or PIT claims; qfq is retrospective adjusted measurement only

splits.access: closed until independently accepted validation PASS

historical_sequential_access: Adjudicate validation first. Any validation failure closes the family without calculating holdout returns. Only independently accepted validation PASS may authorize one holdout calculation.

inference.prng: NumPy Generator PCG64 through the frozen dependency
inference.p_value: (1 + count(centered bootstrap mean >= observed uncentered mean)) / 10001
inference.lower_bound: observed minus the linearly interpolated 0.9833333333333333 quantile of centered bootstrap means

gates_per_gated_split: complete interval count is within the frozen split bounds
one-sided Bonferroni p-value is at or below 1/60
Bonferroni lower confidence bound is positive
strategy geometric annualized net return exceeds benchmark

outcome_free_preflight.status_rule: INPUT_BLOCKED for frozen database, definition, receipt, calendar, master, duplicate-key or entry/exit panel identity failures; otherwise STRUCTURAL_FAIL for any post-purge invalid interval, eligible/selected minimum failure, or split-count failure; cross-boundary purges are counted but excluded from the zero-invalid gate; otherwise PREFLIGHT_PASS
outcome_free_preflight.prohibited_publication: no CRO, rank, security identifier, post-entry return, active return, statistic, NAV or performance gate

stop_rules: Do not repair exclusions, ranking, holding interval, friction, splits, inference or gates after aggregate or outcome observation.
After accepted PREFLIGHT_PASS, execute validation exactly once.
Validation failure closes without opening holdout.
Historical PASS remains non-candidate and stops for external review.
No entry on or after 2026-05-01 and no prospective observation may be accessed.
